posts.author: kevingyy (Kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday team,

I have a feature request related to adding view restrictions on filtered views.

Context
I am currently setting up a Monday board with several filtered views. Each view would be accessible for a defined set of stakeholders. Thus, these stakeholders won’t be able to view the main view or the other filtered view.

Objective
Being able to have a centralized main view where I can see all items as a “super user” while restricting the access to data for other users based on filtered views with restrictions.

Thank you.
